mxCell.value: GovVision - UML Class Diagram (Domain + Service + Integration View)
Shared Core
Module 1 - Decision Workflow
Module 2 - Governance & Compliance
Module 3 - Analytics & AI/ML

User
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+name: string
+email: string
+passwordHash: string
+role: Role
+department: string
+isActive: boolean
------------------
+verifyPassword()
+canAccess(role)

Department
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+name: string
+head: User
+isActive: boolean
------------------
+getComplianceRate()
+getRiskScore()

Decision (m1_decisions)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+title: string
+body: string
+category: string
+priority: Priority
+status: DecisionStatus
+createdBy: User
+department: Department
+approvalChain: ApprovalStep[]
+currentStage: number
+slaDeadline: Date
------------------
+submit()
+approve()
+reject()
+requestRevision()

Comment (m1_comments)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+decisionId: Decision
+author: User
+text: string
+parentId: Comment
+mentions: User[]
+createdAt: Date
------------------
+parseMentions()

Notification (m1_notifications)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+userId: User
+type: NotificationType
+decisionId: Decision
+message: string
+isRead: boolean
+createdAt: Date
------------------
+markRead()

FileVersion (m1_file_versions)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+decisionId: Decision
+fileName: string
+storagePath: string
+versionNumber: number
+uploadedBy: User
+uploadedAt: Date
------------------
+download()

WorkflowConfig (m1_workflow_configs)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+category: string
+approvalChainDef: ApprovalRule[]
+slaDays: number
------------------
+buildApprovalChain()

Policy (m2_policies)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+title: string
+content: string
+category: string
+version: number
+status: PolicyStatus
+effectiveDate: Date
+assignedDepts: Department[]
+weight: number
------------------
+publish()
+archive()

PolicyVersion (m2_policy_versions)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+policyId: Policy
+versionNumber: number
+content: string
+versionNote: string
+changedBy: User
+createdAt: Date

Violation (m2_violations)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+policyId: Policy
+decisionId: Decision
+department: Department
+severity: Severity
+status: ViolationStatus
+assignedOwner: User
+detectedAt: Date
------------------
+resolve()

AuditLog (m2_audit_logs)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+userId: User
+action: string
+module: ModuleTag
+entityType: string
+entityId: ObjectId
+before: object
+after: object
+hash: string
+timestamp: Date
------------------
+computeHash()
+verifyHash()

Risk (m2_risks)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+title: string
+category: string
+likelihood: number
+impact: number
+compositeScore: number
+department: Department
+owner: User
+status: RiskStatus
------------------
+recomputeScore()

KpiSnapshot (m3_kpi_snapshots)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+snapshotDate: Date
+department: Department|null
+totalDecisions: number
+approvedCount: number
+rejectedCount: number
+pendingCount: number
+avgCycleTimeHours: number
+complianceRate: number
+violationCount: number
+riskScore: number
+riskLevel: string
------------------
+upsertSnapshot()

Anomaly (m3_anomalies)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+decisionId: Decision|null
+department: Department
+anomalyScore: number
+severity: string
+description: string
+isAcknowledged: boolean
+acknowledgedBy: User|null
+detectedAt: Date
------------------
+acknowledge()

Forecast (m3_forecasts)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+department: Department|null
+forecastDate: Date
+horizon: 7|14|30
+forecastData: ForecastPoint[]
+modelVersion: string
+createdAt: Date
------------------
+upsertForecast()

Report (m3_reports)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+name: string
+type: ReportType
+format: FileFormat
+params: object
+storagePath: string
+generatedBy: User|null
+scheduleId: ReportSchedule|null
+status: ReportStatus
------------------
+generate()
+download()

ReportSchedule (m3_report_schedules)
------------------
+_id: ObjectId
+name: string
+frequency: string
+cronExpression: string
+reportType: string
+format: string
+params: object
+recipients: string[]
+isActive: boolean
+lastRun: Date|null
+nextRun: Date
------------------
+schedule()
+runNow()
uses category
audit entity
